## Definition of Done

-   [ ] Code Complete: Feature is fully implemented according to specifications.
-   [ ] Code Review: Code reviewed by agent or dev with score above 70/100.
-   [ ] Tests: Tests written and passing >80%.
-   [ ] No Known Critical Bugs: Zero critical or major bugs outstanding.
-   [ ] Version Control: Code merged into the main development branch.
